prompt: How many characters are in the file skills/char-counter/SKILL.md?

assertions.text: Response includes 'Total characters:' label with a number
assertions.description: When asked directly about character count, skill specifies the full block format with this label

assertions.text: Response includes 'Non-whitespace characters:' label with a number
assertions.description: Full block format includes non-whitespace count

assertions.text: Response includes 'Lines:' label with a number
assertions.description: Full block format includes line count
SKILL.md has 48 lines; reported value should match
